arabic: وَعَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى الله عَلَيْهِ وَسلم قضى بِيَمِين وَشَاهد. رَوَاهُ مُسلم

english.text:
Ibn ‘Abbas said that God's Messenger gave a decision on the basis of an oath and a single witness. 

Muslim transmitted it.

chapter.english: The Offices of Commander and Qadi
